notes: Power input is a 3.5mm Phoenix/euroblock screw terminal connector (9–18 VDC, 400 mA @ 12 VDC, 6.6 W typical) — mapped to euroblock-dc as the closest connector type; no IEC mains inlet (requires external DC power supply). All serial, relay, IR, I/O, and AxLink ports use 3.5mm euroblock screw terminals. The 2 RS-232/422/485 ports (Ports 1 & 5) are 10-position euroblock; the 6 RS-232-only ports (Ports 2–4, 6–8) are 5-position euroblock. IR/Serial ports are 2-position euroblock. AxLink ports are 4-position euroblock. Relay ports use 8-position euroblock. Digital I/O uses 10-position euroblock. Ethernet ports are 10/100Base-T only (eth-100m). USB-B is the front programming port; two USB-A host ports (one front, one rear) support mass storage and firmware. An 8 GB SDHC card slot is also present (not a signal port, omitted). Confirmed 1U rack-mount form factor (1.75" × 17" × 9.13").

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: Primary network port for data network / external communications; supports IPv4, IPv6, 802.1X, auto MDI/MDI-X

ports.name: ICSLan
